+---------------------------------+   +---------------------------------------++-----------------------------------+
|  Input Stage                    |   |  Transform Stage                      ||  Output Stage                     |
|                                 |   |                                       ||                                   |
| +--------+        +---------+   |   |  +------------+        +-----------+  ||  +----------+        +---------+  |
| |  Read  +------->|  Parse  +---o---o->|  Validate  +------->|  Convert  +--oo->|  Format  +------->|  Write  |  |
| +--------+        +---------+   |   |  +------------+        +-----------+  ||  +----------+        +---------+  |
|                                 |   |                                       ||                                   |
|                                 |   |                                       ||                                   |
+---------------------------------+   +---------------------------------------++-----------------------------------+
